elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon character holds a megaphone in one hand and a piggy bank in the other, with a thought bubble showing a brain and a dollar sign. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a cheerful cartoon character, holding a megaphone in one hand and a piggy bank in the other, with a thought bubble above containing a brain icon and a dollar sign icon. Clean flat vector art with high contrast, no shading or gradients, on a pure white background. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
